extra.reason: Shipped in 1.0.0: base-error v5 adopted, voValidated + @shirudo/ddd-kit/http presenter added, two-error-style axis documented across LLM.md/README/CHANGELOG/value-objects guide. Merged to main; version bumped rc.9 -> 1.0.0.
Fixed: handler invocation wrapped in async closure so sync throws become rejections; covered by two new tests
Fixed: deepFreeze treats ArrayBuffer views as atomic (pass-through, unfrozen); 6 new tests; documented limitation
Fixed: cloneBuiltIn passes Promise/WeakMap/WeakSet through by reference; 7 new tests across deep-omit and deep-equal-except
Fixed: cloneBuiltIn aliases Error/ArrayBuffer/SharedArrayBuffer (all reference-compared types); 5 new tests
Fixed: post-commit publish failures caught; committed result always returned; observer-only onPublishError hook added; 5 new tests
Fixed: mutator shadowing for Date/Map/Set + recursive Map/Set content freeze + defensive occurredAt copy; 9 new tests
Fixed: ValueObject deep-clones props via deepOmit before freeze; Entity shallow-copies plain-object/array state before freezeShallow; 5 new tests
Fixed: Object.hasOwn guard in dispatchAndCommit; 6 new tests covering toString/constructor/__proto__/hasOwnProperty/valueOf + loadFromHistory
Fixed: pre-call state snapshot + rollback in catch; 2 new tests (DomainError and non-domain propagation)
Fixed per B+C design: fail-fast plain-data check + toSnapshotState/fromSnapshotState hooks + TSnapshotState generic; 6 new tests; guide + LLM.md updated
Fixed: internal-slot brand probes in isBuiltInObject + Array.isArray routing in deepEqual/deepOmit; 11 new tests
Fixed: ancestor-only cache in path-sensitive mode; 3 new tests (per-path predicate, cycle termination, dedup regression guard)
Fixed: cloneForVo walks plain structures preserving symbol keys; vacuous test made strict; 4 tests
Fixed on fix/p1-review-fixes; covered by 12 new tests
Fixed on fix/p1-review-fixes; covered by 12 new tests
Fixed on fix/p1-review-fixes; covered by 12 new tests
Fixed on fix/p1-review-fixes; covered by 12 new tests
Fixed on fix/p1-review-fixes; covered by 12 new tests
Fixed: brand-verified guard, Error + symbol-key fail-fast, structuredClone-aligned walk; 5 new tests
Fixed: brand-verified guard, Error + symbol-key fail-fast, structuredClone-aligned walk; 5 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 7 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 7 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 7 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 7 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 2 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 2 new tests
Fixed: sameValueZero in TypedArray/Date/wrapper comparisons; 3 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 5 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 5 new tests
Fixed on fix/p3-cleanups; 5 new tests

Done: shared REFERENCE_COMPARED_TAGS, entity contract docs public. Walker unification deliberately NOT done: cloneForVo (ownership clone) and deepOmit (comparison tool with aliasing semantics) now have documented, intentionally divergent leaf semantics — unifying them would couple two different contracts
Implemented changedKeys/hasChanges dirty tracking on AggregateRoot with docs and 23 new tests; all gates green
design-decisions.md section rewritten: TransactionScope stays minimal, change detection on the aggregate, orchestration in withCommit, opt-in UoW facade as planned next layer
Decided and recorded in design fields; Phase 1 (ddd-kit-ts-rdt) design updated with the resulting API surface
Decided and recorded in design fields; Phase 1 (ddd-kit-ts-rdt) design updated with the resulting API surface

Explicit-save UnitOfWork shipped: run() facade over withCommit, RepositoryFactories registry, UnitOfWorkSession enrollment (saved/deleted, idempotent, save-after-delete throws), error taxonomy (NestedUnitOfWorkError/TransactionClosedError/CommitError/RollbackError/AggregateDeletedError), context invalidation after close, 20 tests, guide + LLM.md + CHANGELOG. Design note: nesting guard is per-instance single-flight; instances are per-operation (parallel-safe by construction).

IdentityMap shipped: class-keyed two-level storage, strict set (no-op same instance, throws on hydrated-twice violation), deletion tombstones (AggregateDeletedError on re-registration), per-run lifetime with clear-on-close, session.identityMap with TransactionClosedError guard. 13 new tests (9 standalone + 4 UoW integration), guide section, repository.md tip, LLM.md, CHANGELOG.

Repository Contract Test Suite shipped as @shirudo/ddd-kit/testing: createRepositoryContractTests(harness), framework-agnostic, 12 contract tests incl. the mandatory two-writer conflict (final state = winner, outbox = winner only), capability-gated version-only/child-collection/cross-instance tests. In-memory reference adapter (real predicate, identity-map read path, enroll-before-write) passes the suite; a mutant test pins that a predicate-less repo FAILS it. Contract refinement: save() enrolls before the row write so the deleted-gate fires as AggregateDeletedError pre-SQL. Guide section 'Proving the contract' as the compliance bar; real-DB requirement for SQL adapters documented. Release gate for the stable claim is satisfied at the kit level.

aggregateVersion shipped as optional DomainEvent field, distinct from event.version (schema). Decision: stamped by withCommit at harvest onto frozen copies (commit version = OCC row version; pre-set values via CreateDomainEventOptions win; pendingEvents untouched; Outbox port unchanged — fully additive). Per-commit granularity documented (ES stream positions stay the event store's concern). Contract suite mandatory test asserts committed outbox events carry it; outbox guide recommends indexed columns. 4 new withCommit tests.

DECIDED: ship it. DuplicateAggregateError (InfrastructureError, pinned name, not retryable, user-safe message without id leak) — same delegation model as ConcurrencyConflictError: kit ships class + per-driver mapping docs (PG 23505, MySQL 1062, SQLite SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_UNIQUE), consumer repo throws on the insert path. Repository guide save() skeleton shows the try/catch mapping; contract suite gains a capability-gated duplicate-insert test (existing row untouched) + mutant test; in-memory reference implements the check; LLM.md stale 'only concrete classes' line fixed. 6 new tests.
Done on feat/uow-abortsignal: contract-suite-mandatory danger callout + cancellation section + scope-sig sync + 3 correctness fixes (uer); AbortSignal pre-flight/context/scope-forward + 6 tests (0e9)
Done on feat/uow-abortsignal: contract-suite-mandatory danger callout + cancellation section + scope-sig sync + 3 correctness fixes (uer); AbortSignal pre-flight/context/scope-forward + 6 tests (0e9)

EventHarvestError (BaseError-direct, non-retryable) for harvest-guard violations; UoW passes it through via cause-chain walk (wrapping-scope safe); CommitError narrowed to transient outbox/commit; code-review fixes folded in; 5 tests

UnenrolledChangesError end-of-run guard via precise load-vs-commit pending-count delta in IdentityMap; best-effort net (contract suite = full mitigation); code-review cleanups (private iteration, shared duck-type helper, best-effort doc); 6 tests

RetryingTransactionScope: someChainRetryable classification, exp backoff +/-20% jitter, last-error-unchanged on exhaustion, AbortSignal-bounded waits, constructor validation; outbox-must-be-transactional documented; shared abortReason helper extracted; code-review fixes folded in; 13 tests
Upgraded @shirudo/base-error 5->7.1.1: self-contained toProblemDetails, dropped removed user-message API, docs+changelog updated. Gates green.
Shipped toPublicErrorView in @shirudo/ddd-kit/presentation (Option B, headless: transport stays with the consumer). 5 new tests, gates green.
Built A: generic Result<T,E> error channel for CommandBus/QueryBus (default string, errorMapper for typed E). Aligns impl with the documented contract. 711 tests green.
Converted AggregateNotFound/Duplicate/ConcurrencyConflict ctors to options objects; removed redundant createDomainEventWithMetadata. All call sites/tests/docs/CHANGELOG updated. 711 tests green.
Implemented DomainStateMachine API with tests and documentation
Hardened DomainStateMachine snapshots, outputs, and wrapper definition ownership
Prepared 2.1.0 release metadata and verified typecheck, tests, lint, build, docs build, and npm pack dry-run.
Clarified the DomainStateMachine guide with a correct AggregateRoot usage example and explicit output handling.
Documented that DomainStateMachine outputs are plain returned values, not emitted Domain Events/EventBus messages; aggregate events still go through recordEvent/commit.
Fixed DomainStateMachine transition lookup to require own transition keys and added regression coverage for Object.prototype event names.

Preserved explicit null/undefined context updates, copied definitions through null-prototype maps so own __proto__ keys survive, and validated malformed runtime definitions as structured errors. Covered by regression tests.
Fixed malformed input and reducer result edge cases with tests
Documented how to model forbidden, guarded, and terminal domain state machine transitions
Copied and deep-froze state machine contexts, aligned constructor snapshot overloads, and documented all structured errors
Fixed pure function snapshot isolation, hardened context clone contract, added edge-case coverage, and updated docs.
Rejected accessor context data, deep-copied/deep-froze transition outputs, added tests, and documented the data-only boundary.
Copied and deep-froze events before guards/reducers, rejected invalid event data, added output invalid-data coverage, and updated docs.
Fixed transition lookup to preserve forbidden-transition semantics before event payload cloning; covered missing and terminal transitions.
Strict guard result validation, terminal definition validation, plain-data rejection for custom class instances, tests, and docs added.
Rejected accessor runtime snapshots and transition result wrappers via descriptor validation; added regression tests.
Rejected descriptor accessors across definitions and array data without invoking getters; rejected Map/Set subclasses; added regression tests.
Rejected non-pure built-ins in domain state machine data and covered edge cases
Fixed all review findings with regression coverage; full tests, typecheck, build, prepublish, and docs build pass.
Closed snapshot invariant, definition-copy, cross-realm data, documentation, and regression-test gaps
Prevented toStringTag accessor execution, added recursive readonly API contracts and type tests, and reused prepared wrapper definitions/results; all release and docs gates pass.

Rejected inherited toStringTag accessors without invocation across realms and arrays, made deepFreeze tag detection accessor-safe, and eliminated redundant wrapper context cloning with deterministic identity tests; all release/docs gates pass.
Fixed internal-slot mutator blocking for Date, Map, and Set with own or inherited toStringTag accessors; added regression coverage and passed release gates.
Added descriptor-aware internal-slot fallback for Date, Map, and Set; deepFreeze and vo now handle own/inherited data toStringTag overrides with regression coverage and all release gates passing.

Generalized accessor-safe built-in classification across supported atomic types, rejected masked Promise/Weak collections, added BigInt value semantics, and covered own/inherited tags plus cross-realm behavior; all release gates pass.
Rejected unsafe custom class and built-in subclass cloning in vo()/ValueObject; added adversarial, cross-realm, and null-prototype coverage; updated docs.
Docs scripts now invoke local TypeDoc and VitePress binaries directly; npm run docs:build passes without nested pnpm policy checks.
Value equality is now fail-closed: object Map keys and Set members are rejected with explicit errors and regression coverage.
VO cloning now uses data descriptors, rejects accessors without invocation, preserves array/symbol/sparse structure, compares array own properties, and bypasses overridden collection iterators.
DomainStateMachine now uses native intrinsic constructor verification for cross-Realm Object/Array prototypes with adversarial context/event/output tests.
Replaced native-code substring detection with captured intrinsic source verification; covered VO and state-machine Proxy spoofing without trap execution.
Preserved sparse arrays and all filtered own properties in deepOmit; covered deepEqualExcept regressions.
Documented the portable Proxy-free trusted-input precondition for DomainStateMachine and Value Objects without claiming an impossible ECMAScript sandbox guarantee.
deepOmit now restores the complete Array length descriptor after cloning entries; covered non-writable length.
Added deterministic depth, unique-node, and own-property budgets across context/event/output cloning with regression coverage.
Depth is now validated before memoized shared references are resolved; property-order bypass covered by regression test.
Added exact-maximum acceptance tests for depth, unique-node, and own-property budgets; temporary >= mutation proved all three tests detect off-by-one regressions.
Split the domain state machine into focused internal modules, preserved the public API, and verified all tests, types, lint, and build.
Completed the state machine guide, converted the executable saga example to the real machine API, added API TSDoc, and verified generated API and VitePress builds.
Added and verified the DomainStateMachine versus XState decision guide.
Replaced the prose comparison with a verified capability and fit table plus concise decision rule.
Clarified that XState can model the same lifecycles and that the kit machine's value is its narrower DDD contract and runtime boundaries.
Renamed the complete public and internal machine input contract, errors, callbacks, tests, examples, changelog, and guide; all tests, types, builds, and generated docs pass.
Added typed DomainError guard rejections with can/dispatch split semantics, exact error propagation, malformed-result validation, atomicity tests, docs, changelog, and generated API verification.
Added typed state-local context invariants with strict runtime validation, documentation, and edge-case coverage.
Implemented a typed, deterministic, side-effect-free definition analyzer with sound graph diagnostics, frozen transition matrices, adversarial tests, and documented proof boundaries.
Documented versioned snapshot migration, transactional inbox/outbox deduplication with optimistic concurrency, explicit deadline inputs, and output versus Domain Event boundaries.

Final release audit completed: no unresolved major architecture findings; 881 tests, lint, typecheck, package build, Typedoc, VitePress, package contents, runtime exports, declarations, naming, docs, and release notes verified.
Completed all DomainStateMachine DDD contract improvements, analyzer, production guidance, tests, and final release audit.
Enforced immutable value semantics for all admitted VO values; added regression tests, docs, and source-state typing fix.

Fixed: constructor now resolves the overload by value, treating explicit undefined snapshot as no-snapshot (falls back to initial). Widened reconstitution overload to accept undefined. Added regression test + inverted the stale type-level assertion.
Fixed with regression tests; typecheck + 900 tests + build green
Fixed with regression tests; typecheck + 900 tests + build green
Fixed with regression tests; typecheck + 900 tests + build green
Fixed with regression tests; typecheck + 904 tests + build green
Fixed with regression tests; typecheck + 904 tests + build green
Fixed with regression tests; typecheck + 904 tests + build green
Implemented onPersistError observer + extracted classifyRunError; tests + typecheck + 908 tests + build green
Implemented onPersistError observer + extracted classifyRunError; tests + typecheck + 908 tests + build green
Fixed via reportToObserver helper for both observers; regression test proven to fail without fix; 909 tests + typecheck + build green
Fixed on branch fix/audit-p1 with TDD (red-green verified); full suite 914/914, typecheck/build/lint clean
Fixed on branch fix/audit-p1 with TDD (red-green verified); full suite 914/914, typecheck/build/lint clean
Fixed on branch fix/audit-p1 with TDD (red-green verified); full suite 914/914, typecheck/build/lint clean
JSDoc guidance in domain-event.ts and handler.ts aligned with the outbox guide (eventId dedup, per-commit watermark semantics); v3 per-event sequence evaluation split into a follow-up bead

Decision: 2.x ships deprecation of the implicit default (JSDoc on setState/autoVersionBump with lost-update mechanics, aggregates-guide warning box, CHANGELOG Deprecated entry); v3 makes bumpVersion a required argument (compile-time forcing beats a silent default flip). v3 work split into follow-up bead.

Decision: opt-in deepFreezeState on EntityConfig/AggregateConfig (option b, explicit config instead of NODE_ENV magic: the kit is edge-runtime-first and env detection is unreliable there). Implemented across constructor/setState/apply/snapshot-restore paths via a protected freezeState method, TDD (8 tests), documented as plain-data-only with in-place ownership transfer of nested inputs. Default stays shallow.

loadFromHistory and restoreFromSnapshotWithEvents now guard the replay target (new UnreplayableAggregateError, crash-loud BaseError posture); the blessing JSDoc example removed, guide corrected; catch-up on persisted aggregates stays supported and is now pinned by tests. TDD, 927/927.

snapshotAt now reads the swappable clock (withClockFactory pins it); clock moved to internal src/aggregate/clock.ts so createSnapshot shares it with createDomainEvent without new public API. TDD, 927/927.

onRetry now routed through the shared reportToObserver helper (extracted from handler.ts into internal src/utils/observer.ts, not exported from barrels); throwing and async-rejecting observers neither stop retries nor mask the original error. TDD (2 RED-verified tests + async pin), 930/930.

All five items: Node claim aligned to 20+ in README/getting-started/LLM.md/edge-runtimes guide; EntityBase drift fixed and both entity.ts JSDoc examples rewritten to setState; commit() naming rationale recorded in design-decisions.md; VO which-API-when section already existed in value-objects.md (covers vo/ValueObject/voWithValidation/voValidated), no change needed; find() pagination warning already linked in IQueryableRepository JSDoc.

Shipped: EventStore<Evt> port (expectedVersion-guarded atomic append, readStream with fromVersion), InMemoryEventStore reference impl (9 TDD tests), and createEsRepositoryContractTests in the testing entry (7 suite tests: mandatory two-writer append conflict, replay equality/fold order, null-for-unknown-stream, identity map, rollback purity + retried first save, fromVersion slicing, capability-gated duplicate-create). Shared contract assertions extracted for both suites; in-repo reference adapter with mutant pinning (blind append, reversed read). Guide section, README bullet, CHANGELOG. 950/950.

AggregateSnapshot carries schemaVersion (stamped from overridable snapshotSchemaVersion, default 1); both restore paths check before assignment: mismatch throws the new SnapshotSchemaMismatchError (InfrastructureError, discard-and-refold guidance) or routes through the overridable migrateSnapshotState hook; legacy snapshots without the field are treated as schema 1 (pinned by test); fields readonly. TDD, 962/962.

getPending ordering (commit order) is now part of the Outbox port contract with SQL guidance (monotonic position + ORDER BY), pinned by test on InMemoryOutbox. New DispatchTrackingOutbox extension (markFailed + deadLetters, attempts on OutboxRecord); InMemoryOutbox implements it with maxDeliveryAttempts (default 5), dead-lettered records leave getPending, markDispatched clears them too; outbox guide documents the retry-then-dead-letter dispatcher loop. TDD, 962/962.

2.x: named UnregisteredHandlerError (busKind, messageType; BaseError crash-loud family) delivered through the error channel with a byte-identical default string message; executeUnsafe throws it. CQRS guide documents the posture. v3 throw split into ddd-kit-ts-efo8. TDD, gates green.

prepareDomainMachineDefinition + PreparedDomainMachineDefinition shipped; the three pure functions and the DomainStateMachine constructor recognize prepared handles via a WeakSet registry and skip per-call validate-and-copy; raw path keeps documented per-call safety. The no-guard input-clone skip was deliberately NOT done: it would change the documented can() semantics (invalid payload must still throw). Guide section added. TDD, gates green.

All entry points (index, utils, testing; http/presentation were already named) use curated named exports; d.ts surface verified byte-identical against the previous build (143/7/10/3/3 names, zero missing/added); new src/api-surface.test.ts pins the runtime export list of every entry. Shipped internals (computeBackoffDelay, freezeShallow) kept until v3 per bead.

v3: bumpVersion is a required argument on AggregateRoot.setState (never-overload keeps Entity base compatibility, TypeError runtime guard fires before mutation for compiler-bypassing calls); autoVersionBump removed, AggregateConfig is now an EntityConfig alias. TDD (type-level RED via unused ts-expect-error, runtime guard pinned), guides + CHANGELOG migration notes. 980/980.

v3: execute throws UnregisteredHandlerError on both buses; errorMapper only sees failures a registered handler produced (pinned: mapper not called). JSDoc, CQRS guide and CHANGELOG migration notes updated. TDD, 980/980.

computeBackoffDelay removed from the package entry (module export stays for its direct-source unit tests); Key/PathSegment hard-renamed to DeepOmitKey/DeepOmitPathSegment per maintainer decision (no aliases). RED via the api-surface guard; d.ts surface diff verified to be exactly the intended three changes. CHANGELOG Removed (breaking) with migration note. 983/983.

One delete contract: IRepository.delete(aggregate), IUnitOfWorkRepository is now the documented minimal subset (delta only exists()). Design decisions recorded: no interface inheritance (generic Evt mismatch not worth the coupling), withCommit-only flow documented (aggregates + deleted arrays), id-only bulk cleanup explicitly excluded from the port (repository-specific purge methods). Type-level RED via ts-expect-error; contract suites unchanged (already aggregate-shaped); repository guide reworked (pattern 2 now uses the deleted marker, pattern 3 load-then-delete + bulk escape). CHANGELOG Changed (breaking) with migration. 983/983.

3.0.0 published to npm (maintainer OTP), tag v3.0.0 and GitHub release live, CHANGELOG dated with the consolidated upgrade checklist, engines Node 22+, base-error peer ^8 (verified empirically against 8.1.0).

v3 epic complete: all five work packages shipped (u9to, efo8, cryw, 8455, zyqs) across PRs 10-12; released as v3.0.0 on 2026-07-05. Out-of-scope decisions honored (no deepFreezeState default flip, commit() name kept, commitSequence parked as needs-driven minor in ddd-kit-ts-yyg7).
